name: Cafe Au Mint Chocolate Pie (a Girl Scout Cookie Recipe)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 Sleeves of Girl Scout Thin Mint Cookies (crushed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease the sides and bottom of a 9-inch pie pan heavily with regular (not light) stick margarine.
2. Process the crushed cookies in a food processor until they form crumbs, then press them into the prepared pie pan.
3. Bake for 10 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Soften the ice cream in the refrigerator for four hours (or one hour at room temperature).
5. Fill the baked and cooled pie shell with the softened ice cream and cover with wax paper.
6. Freeze until ready to serve.
7. Melt the chocolate chips and whipping cream over the lowest heat setting, then spread over the frozen pie.
8. Return the pie to the freezer until serving.
